plugin_desc: Sangoma Vega voice gateway SNMP baseline child template. This child template relies on the shared VoiceGateway SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The Vega voice-gateway family and enterprise MIB subtree are verified, but stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health leaf OIDs are not proven in this pass, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: VoiceGateway
